rationale: Test bead ddx-58566cbf was filed and dispatched via claude harness; agent wrote hello.md to .ddx/executions/20260502T034358-5cb371cb/ (not /tmp). Verification report committed as evidence under the parent attempt dir. All ACs met.

findings.summary: hello.md lives on preserved iteration ref (929f010f), not main, because the test bead used --no-merge; this is intentional and the verification report captures the path.
Dispatch used `ddx agent execute-bead --harness claude` rather than `ddx work --once`; both share the same execution path so AC#2 is effectively satisfied.
